title: Laundry Interior Visualization
shortDesc: A modern laundry interior brought to life through detailed 3D visualization, showcasing an efficient layout and clean contemporary design.
description: This project presents a modern laundry interior brought to life through detailed 3D visualization, featuring an efficient layout, carefully arranged machines, and a comfortable waiting area. With realistic materials, balanced lighting, and a clean contemporary aesthetic, the visualization provides a clear preview of the space, allowing clients to experience the atmosphere and functionality of the design before it is built.

title: Sci-Fi Scythe
shortDesc: A futuristic sci-fi scythe designed as a high-detail game asset, featuring sharp mechanical forms, glowing energy elements, and a sleek cyber-inspired aesthetic suitable for sci-fi themed games.
description: This personal project focuses on creating a high-quality sci-fi weapon asset designed for game environments. The scythe was modeled with sharp mechanical shapes and a futuristic silhouette to emphasize a strong and aggressive visual identity. Materials were developed using Blender’s node-based shading system to create realistic metallic surfaces and glowing emissive energy elements. Through careful texturing, lighting, and rendering, the final result presents a visually striking game asset that highlights both the design and technical workflow suitable for sci-fi game development.

title: Isometric Design
shortDesc: A stylized isometric workspace scene created in 3D, featuring a cozy streaming or gaming setup with soft lighting and a clean minimalist aesthetic.
description: This personal project explores the creation of a stylized isometric workspace environment designed with a clean and cozy atmosphere. The scene features a compact gaming or streaming setup including a desk, monitor, laptop, chair, and small decorative elements arranged within a minimal room layout. Each asset was modeled with simplified geometric forms to maintain the stylized aesthetic while preserving recognizable proportions. Materials and colors were carefully chosen to create a soft pastel visual tone, while lighting was adjusted to enhance depth and warmth within the small isometric space. The final render highlights a balanced composition and demonstrates the use of Blender for stylized environment visualization.
